prompt: Create a real sea scene with three dolphins in the same positions as in the provided image.
prompt_refined: Generate a photorealistic image depicting a real sea scene with three dolphins. The dolphins should replicate the exact spatial arrangement and relative sizes of the animals shown in image 1. Specifically, there should be a large dolphin in the upper-left, a medium-sized dolphin positioned below and to its right, and a smaller dolphin (calf) located further below and to the right of the medium one. All three dolphins should be swimming horizontally from left to right.
objects: Medium-sized dolphin positioned below and to the right of the large one
Small dolphin (calf) located further below and to the right of the medium one
Dolphins swimming horizontally from left to right
Relative sizes of the three dolphins replicating image 1
